item.title: Rudy Meekins Reflects on Four Purple Hearts
item.description: Rudy Meekins recalls the Korean War and the four Purple Hearts he earned, reflecting on the battles and the lasting cost of service.

media:content.media:title: Rudy Meekins Reflects on Four Purple Hearts
media:content.media:description: Rudy Meekins recalls the Korean War and the four Purple Hearts he earned, reflecting on the battles and the lasting cost of service.

item.title: The Crucible of Brotherhood in Navy SEALs
item.description: A look at the brotherhood and training that shape Navy SEALs, reflecting service, endurance, and the bonds forged through shared challenge.

media:content.media:title: The Crucible of Brotherhood in Navy SEALs
media:content.media:description: A look at the brotherhood and training that shape Navy SEALs, reflecting service, endurance, and the bonds forged through shared challenge.

item.title: I Didn't Know if I Was Alive or Dead
item.description: A veteran reflects on a moment of uncertainty in service, sharing a firsthand war story about survival, duty, and the lasting impact of combat.

media:content.media:title: I Didn't Know if I Was Alive or Dead
media:content.media:description: A veteran reflects on a moment of uncertainty in service, sharing a firsthand war story about survival, duty, and the lasting impact of combat.

item.title: WWII Medic Jacob Ruser's Wartime Ordeal
item.description: WWII combat medic Jacob Ruser recalls being knocked unconscious by a German tank blast, with others believing he had been killed.

media:content.media:title: WWII Medic Jacob Ruser's Wartime Ordeal
media:content.media:description: WWII combat medic Jacob Ruser recalls being knocked unconscious by a German tank blast, with others believing he had been killed.

item.title: WWII Medic Jacob Ruser’s Wartime Story
item.description: WWII combat medic Jacob Ruser recalls one night when a German tank knocked him unconscious and he was briefly considered dead.

media:content.media:title: WWII Medic Jacob Ruser’s Wartime Story
media:content.media:description: WWII combat medic Jacob Ruser recalls one night when a German tank knocked him unconscious and he was briefly considered dead.

item.title: Bailing Out of a B-17 Bomber
item.description: A veteran recounts the experience of bailing out of a B-17 bomber, offering a firsthand wartime memory from the air war.

media:content.media:title: Bailing Out of a B-17 Bomber
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts the experience of bailing out of a B-17 bomber, offering a firsthand wartime memory from the air war.

item.title: Rich Coachys: 34 Years in Uniform
item.description: Indiana University football player turned Army officer Rich Coachys served in Vietnam, earned the Bronze Star for Valor, and rose to colonel in the Army Reserve.

media:content.media:title: Rich Coachys: 34 Years in Uniform
media:content.media:description: Indiana University football player turned Army officer Rich Coachys served in Vietnam, earned the Bronze Star for Valor, and rose to colonel in the Army Reserve.

item.title: The Doolittle Raid: A Historic Air Mission
item.description: A look at the Doolittle Raid, a daring World War II air mission that tested courage, planning, and resolve against overwhelming odds.

media:content.media:title: The Doolittle Raid: A Historic Air Mission
media:content.media:description: A look at the Doolittle Raid, a daring World War II air mission that tested courage, planning, and resolve against overwhelming odds.

item.title: Jason Redman’s Navy SEAL Story
item.description: Jason Redman joined the U.S. Navy on September 11, 1992, served 11 years as a Navy SEAL, and was wounded in Fallujah in 2007.

media:content.media:title: Jason Redman’s Navy SEAL Story
media:content.media:description: Jason Redman joined the U.S. Navy on September 11, 1992, served 11 years as a Navy SEAL, and was wounded in Fallujah in 2007.

item.title: Rudy Meekins: Incheon and Chosin
item.description: Marine PFC Rudy Meekins recalls landing at Incheon, fighting at Chosin Reservoir, and recovering from wounds earned in Korea.

media:content.media:title: Rudy Meekins: Incheon and Chosin
media:content.media:description: Marine PFC Rudy Meekins recalls landing at Incheon, fighting at Chosin Reservoir, and recovering from wounds earned in Korea.

item.title: I Tossed My Grenade and Cleared the Bunker
item.description: A veteran recounts a wartime moment of courage and survival, reflecting on the actions that helped clear a bunker.

media:content.media:title: I Tossed My Grenade and Cleared the Bunker
media:content.media:description: A veteran recounts a wartime moment of courage and survival, reflecting on the actions that helped clear a bunker.

item.title: Surviving Against All Odds
item.description: A respectful look at a heroic stand and the courage, service, and survival behind it.

media:content.media:title: Surviving Against All Odds
media:content.media:description: A respectful look at a heroic stand and the courage, service, and survival behind it.

item.title: Remembering Abraham Lincoln at Memorial Day Parade
item.description: A remembrance of President Abraham Lincoln at the 2026 Memorial Day Parade, honoring his place in American history and national memory.

media:content.media:title: Remembering Abraham Lincoln at Memorial Day Parade
media:content.media:description: A remembrance of President Abraham Lincoln at the 2026 Memorial Day Parade, honoring his place in American history and national memory.

item.title: How I Survived in the Ball Turret
item.description: A veteran recalls surviving in the ball turret, sharing a firsthand wartime account of service, endurance, and survival.

media:content.media:title: How I Survived in the Ball Turret
media:content.media:description: A veteran recalls surviving in the ball turret, sharing a firsthand wartime account of service, endurance, and survival.
